name: Black Forest Pumpernickel
recipeIngredient: 1 1/8 cup Water (for Welbilt/Dak machines add 2 tablespoons more water)
2 teaspoons RED STAR active dry yeast for all machines except 1 1/2-pound Panasonic/National mac (use 4)
3/4 cup Water (for Welbilt machine add 1 tablespoon more water)
2 teaspoons RED STAR active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in the bread pan.
2. Select a light crust setting and press "Start".
3. After the baking cycle ends, remove the bread from the pan.
4. Place it on a cake rack and allow to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
This is a dark bread with that fabulous, distinctive rye flavor. Pair this soul-satisfying bread with thin slices of ham and cheese or a mug of homemade potato soup.
